hero.subheading: Your AI assistant modernizes your clinic by managing appointments, recording patient preferences, and scheduling follow-ups, so you can focus on delivering great treatments.

stats.label: Fewer missed appointments with automated reminders.
Reduction in time spent on manual scheduling and note-taking.
Higher repeat visits through personalized patient engagement and loyalty automation.

blocks.heading: A Smarter Way to Run Your Physiotherapist Business
blocks.text: At VirtualAssistant.com.au, we understand how demanding running a clinic can be. Whether you're a solo operator or manage a growing team, our AI Virtual Receptionist ensures every call is answered promptly — even when your staff are busy — all with your business's tone and style.

blocks.heading: Focus on Treatment, Not the Phone
blocks.text: Your AI Receptionist keeps your focus on delivering great treatments while it handles appointments, answers common questions, and manages your calendar in real time.

blocks.heading: Never Miss a Appointment Again
blocks.text: Even during busy periods or after hours, your AI Receptionist ensures every appointment, inquiry, and message is captured — so you never lose a patient because of a missed call again.

keyBenefits.heading: Key Benefits
keyBenefits.subheading: Enhance your clinic operations with AI-driven automation that simplifies appointments, personalizes service, and boosts patients retention.

items.title: Handle Every Appointment Instantly
items.desc: Answers calls and books appointments automatically, with full details captured and confirmed.

items.title: Manage Your Calendar Effortlessly
items.desc: Books, confirms, and updates appointments while syncing with your existing schedule.

items.title: Fully Customizable to Your Business
items.desc: Trained to understand your services, pricing, and the specific needs of your clinic.

items.title: Works for All Business Sizes
items.desc: Perfect for solo operators or large teams — scaling effortlessly as you grow.

items.title: Affordable 24/7 Coverage
items.desc: Acts as a full-time receptionist that never sleeps — handling calls and appointments day or night.

items.title: Improved Patients Experience
items.desc: Delivers quick, friendly, and accurate responses that keep patients coming back.

items.title: Automated Appointments
items.desc: Automatically handles appointments, cancellations, and waitlists without manual intervention.

items.title: Time-Saving Automation
items.desc: Lets your team focus on service and hospitality while the AI handles confirmations and follow-ups.

items.title: Boosted Patients Loyalty
items.desc: Sends tailored offers, reminders, and follow-ups that keep patients coming back.

whyChooseUs.heading: Why Physiotherapist Businesses Choose VirtualAssistant.com.au
whyChooseUs.text: Our AI Virtual Receptionist is trusted by clinices across Australia — from solo operators to multi-location businesses. It integrates seamlessly with your existing tools and scheduling systems, so every call and appointment is handled smoothly. Let our AI handle the phones while you focus on what you do best.

highlight.heading: Simplify Notes, Orders, and Follow-Ups
highlight.text: After each appointment, your team can record quick voice memos that are automatically transcribed and summarized — great for noting client requests or special instructions. You can also upload pricing, service details, or feedback directly into your dashboard, keeping everything organized in one place.

items.title: Appointment Management
items.desc: Manage real-time appointments, waitlists, and updates efficiently.

items.title: Task Tracking
items.desc: Track jobs, appointments, and follow-ups without missing a step.

items.title: Patients Engagement
items.desc: Send personalized reminders, offers, and loyalty alerts to patients.

items.title: Feedback Collection
items.desc: Gather post-service feedback automatically to improve quality.

items.title: Automated Confirmations
items.desc: Reduce no-shows with instant SMS or email confirmations.

items.title: Smart Promotions
items.desc: Use AI to identify repeat patients and send personalized offers.

items.title: Quick Access to Patients Profiles
items.desc: Review preferences, feedback, and appointment history instantly for better service.
